interaction_phrase: thanks to our partner Quantum Design
occurrence_sentence: The unrivalled success of the Qnami ProteusQ in Europe and – thanks to our partner Quantum Design – in the USA, has led Qnami to sign an agreement with Quantum Design Japan and South Korea for exclusive local distribution rights of the ProteusQ.

interaction_phrase: Addressing the vibrant and cutting-edge research communities in Japan
occurrence_sentence: Addressing the vibrant and cutting-edge research communities in both South Korea and Japan is a natural extension for the Qnami sales & customer support team, and both partners are looking forward to enabling even further advanced spintronics and nanomagnetism research.

interaction_phrase: Addressing the vibrant and cutting-edge research communities in South Korea
occurrence_sentence: Addressing the vibrant and cutting-edge research communities in both South Korea and Japan is a natural extension for the Qnami sales & customer support team, and both partners are looking forward to enabling even further advanced spintronics and nanomagnetism research.

John MacArthur, Head of Quantum Design Japan sees this as a natural synergy – 'we have many years' experience in providing and supporting instrumentation for nanoscale characterization and sensitive magnetic measurements, and the ProteusQ addresses questions that our valued customers are already asking.

interaction_phrase: the success of the Qnami/Quantum Design partnership
occurrence_sentence: 'The success of the Qnami/Quantum Design partnership in the US has laid the groundwork for this agreement.

interaction_phrase: to bring our turnkey, open-design Scanning NV magnetometer ProteusQ to Japan
occurrence_sentence: It was always a priority for us to bring our turnkey, open-design Scanning NV magnetometer ProteusQ to Japan and Korea, and the initial response of the scientific community has been very receptive' said Benjamin Holmes Quantum Sales Manager for the Far East at Qnami.
